summary: Comprehensive testing of Actor's Companion pipeline debug features. All new pipeline tracking features working correctly: /api/debug/pipeline returns all stages, /api/analyze/text and /api/analyze/image return _debug objects with stages array and fallback boolean, fallback responses work correctly for unsupported files, iOS octet-stream MIME type edge case handled properly.

minor.issue: Budget exceeded error during testing (external API limitation, not code bug)
minor.impact: Intermittent - fallback mechanism correctly handles this

passed_tests: GET /api/debug/pipeline returns all_ok:true with all stages (llm_key, gpt_call, mongodb, image_processing, heic_support, pdf_support)
POST /api/analyze/text _debug.stages includes input_received, gpt_analysis, db_save all with ok:true
POST /api/analyze/image with JPEG returns 200 with _debug.stages (file_received, type_detection, image_convert, gpt_vision, db_save)
POST /api/analyze/image with PDF returns 200 with _debug.stages (file_received, type_detection, pdf_extract, gpt_analysis, db_save)
POST /api/analyze/image with application/octet-stream MIME (iOS edge case) detects as image and succeeds
POST /api/analyze/image with empty file returns 400 with descriptive error
POST /api/analyze/image with unsupported file returns fallback response with _debug info
Frontend: Breakdown view displays correctly after successful analysis (no fallback banner)
Frontend: Console logs _debug stages after analysis
Frontend: Recent breakdowns visible on upload page and clickable
Frontend: All breakdown cards render (scene summary, objective, stakes, beats, takes, tips)
Frontend: Takes tabs (grounded, bold, wildcard) work correctly
Frontend: Context fields toggle and display properly
Frontend: Header buttons present (new analysis, export PDF, share, regenerate)

success_rate.backend: 86% (12/14 tests passed - 2 failures due to external LLM budget limit, not code bugs)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test files at /tmp/test_sides.jpg and /tmp/test_sides.pdf
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline debug features fully implemented and working. The _debug object is returned on all analyze responses with stages array and fallback boolean. Fallback mechanism returns HTTP 200 with partial data instead of HTTP 500. Test files available at /tmp/test_sides.jpg and /tmp/test_sides.pdf. LLM budget may be limited - fallback responses will be triggered when budget exceeded.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All requested features working correctly.
